HR Policies & Office Culture

Office Culture Settings

These settings control how employees interact with you and respond to conversations. Adjust these to create the office atmosphere you prefer.

Balanced
← Professional Relaxed →
What this affects:
  • 0-33 (Professional): Formal workplace. NPCs keep professional distance, maintain boundaries, and focus on work topics.
  • 34-66 (Balanced): Friendly workplace. NPCs are approachable and personable while maintaining appropriate boundaries.
  • 67-100 (Relaxed): Casual workplace. NPCs are very comfortable, open about personal topics, and boundaries are more flexible.
Standard
← Reserved Outgoing →
What this affects:
  • 0-33 (Reserved): NPCs are more distant and may seem cold, tsundere-like, or defensive. Harder to build relationships.
  • 34-66 (Standard): NPCs have balanced personalities - some warm, some cool, all realistic and varied.
  • 67-100 (Outgoing): NPCs are friendly, expressive, and eager to connect. Relationships develop more easily.
Professional
What this affects:
  • Professional: NPCs maintain professional boundaries. Flirting/advances require high relationship stats and are met cautiously.
  • Casual: NPCs are open to personal connections once comfortable. Flirting is welcome when trust/affection are moderate.
  • Enthusiastic: NPCs are receptive and interested in all interactions. Everyone's consenting and relationships develop naturally without barriers.

Employee Starting Stats

Control the starting stat ranges for new hires. Lower values make relationships feel more earned, while higher values create an easier, more welcoming workplace.

⚙️ Presets
Presets apply to all stats. You can fine-tune individual stats below.

Gender Diversity Options

Control the gender distribution of new hires. All employees will still be female by default (100%), but you can adjust these sliders to introduce variety. Sliders are automatically proportional - they will always add up to 100%.

Current Distribution:

👑 CEO Corner - Global Chatroom

💬

Welcome to the CEO Corner!

Chat with other players from around the world. Share tips, strategies, and stories from your business empire!

📜 Chat Rules

  • Be respectful to all players
  • No spam or excessive caps
  • Share game tips and help others
  • Have fun and make friends! 🎉

Settings

Game Preferences

🔒 Content Filter

When enabled, ALL adult/NSFW content is disabled:

  • Hides NSFW image request presets
  • Filters explicit social media posts
  • AI conversations stay workplace-appropriate
  • Hides adult-themed locations & products
  • Blocks explicit content generation
Status: NSFW Content Enabled

⚡ Performance Settings

Adjust these settings if you experience lag or freezing, especially with large social feeds.

Lower = Better performance

🤖 AI Request Management

Control how many AI text requests are sent simultaneously to prevent "Max Requests Exceeded" errors.

Lower = More stable, Higher = Faster but risk errors
Queue Status: Ready
Active/Queued: 0/0
📊 Total Generated: 0

🖼️ Image Request Queue

Max Concurrent Images
Lower values = more stable generation
8
Images take more resources - keep lower than text requests
Queue Status: Ready
Active/Queued: 0/0
📊 Total Generated: 0

🎨 Image Generation Style

Choose the default art style for ALL generated images (profiles, conversations, social posts, scenes).

This will be appended to all image generation prompts.
This style will be applied to all future image generations consistently.

👁️ Image Perspective (POV)

Choose the camera perspective for requested images (selfies, photos, etc.). This affects Chat and Group images, but NOT social media posts (to avoid adding the viewer to public content).

Standard: Shows the scene from an observer's perspective
POV: First-person view - you see what you would see (no male/viewer visible)
Selfie: Subject is holding the camera and looking at it

🎬 Auto Scene Visualization

Automatically generate scene visualizations during conversations. The AI will capture key moments based on conversation context.

Min: 5
Max: 10
Images will generate randomly between min and max message counts
First-Person shows scenes from your point of view
This text is appended to every auto-visualization prompt
Threshold: 50
More triggers Fewer triggers
⚡ When enabled, auto-visualization only triggers during intense moments (physical actions, emotional shifts, dramatic events) rather than just counting messages.
Status: Ready
Auto-Images Generated: 0

Prestige Confirmation

Are you sure you want to prestige? This action cannot be undone!

⚠️ What You'll Lose:

  • All current cash
  • All products and progress
  • All employees and their relationships
  • All owned locations (except Garage)
  • All boss fight progress
  • Chat history and social feed

✅ What You'll Keep:

  • All Influence Points (current + new)
  • Lifetime earnings total
  • Prestige level (increases by 1)
  • All permanent upgrades
  • Player bio and settings
  • 🎁 Gift Shop inventory & generated gifts

🌟 What You'll Gain:

+0
Influence Points
Use these to purchase permanent upgrades that boost all future runs!
💡 Tip: Prestige when you feel your progress has slowed down. The more you've earned, the more influence you'll gain!

📊 Stat Gain Multipliers

Multiply how fast stats increase. 1x = normal, 10x = 10 times faster

⚡ Quick Actions

⏰ Time Controls

Control the speed of in-game time progression. Default is 20:1 (20 game minutes = 1 real minute)

20x
1x (Slowest) 50x (Fast) 100x (Fastest)

20 game minutes = 1 real minute

⏳ Context-Aware Time Dilation

Time flows differently based on what you're doing. Conversations slow down time so you can properly interact.

💬 During 1-on-1 Conversations:
x
👥 During Group Chats:
x
📱 Browsing Social Media:
x
💡 Lower values = slower time. 1x is real-time. Idle time uses the slider above.
